name: MacBook Pro 16-inch — Intel Core i7/i9 (2019)
_note: Memory varies (16/32/64 GB). Set the agent's verbal target to your actual config (e.g. 'I bought a 16-inch Intel MBP with 32 GB') so the assertion is meaningful. The M5 calibration is reused as a placeholder until an Intel-era calibration is added — different defect classes apply (T2 issues, butterfly-keyboard 2018-19, GPU stutter 2019).
